title: 京都金杯の後に・幸先ええで！

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, yesss! Didja see dat?! I got first place, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is overjoyed by her win at the
Kyoto Kimpai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shortly before we decided to enter the race...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm beggin' ya, Trainer! Lemme run in the Kimpai!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why? 'Cause winnin' that race is real lucky. We gotta be there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Comin' in first would bring all kinds of luck my
way. 'Sides, it's the first race of the new year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wanna blast down that track 'n stock up on some
good fortune. Sounds good, right? Whaddaya
say?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a bunch, Trainer. This gonna be one lucky
year!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That goes for both of us! Y'know, since you're the one who let me compete!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And after that, we can divvy up all the luck with
the fans down in Kyoto! Handouts all round!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto Racecourse is teeming with Tamamo
Cross's fans, and she has a smile for every last
one.
